title: Schema-first curation boundary
caption: Schema-first boundary separating governed personal-monitoring payloads from curated accountability evidence. Only selected metadata enter the evidence pathway; raw physiological values remain in the governed payload system.

title: Evidence envelope and payload minimisation
evidence_status: schema-derived structure and explicit minimisation boundary
caption: TrustEvidence envelope structure. The evidence core retains monitoring-accountability context and the signed local receipt binds inclusion metadata. Raw samples, physiological values, direct identifiers and the payload-commitment nonce are excluded from the public envelope.

title: Execution and verification pipeline
evidence_status: executed schema canonicalisation signing and local receipt pathway
caption: Execution pathway from synthetic monitoring-accountability metadata to preserved evidence. Validation, canonicalisation, signatures, local Merkle inclusion and retained-checkpoint consistency are distinct failure gates.

title: Bounded local passage and receipt sizes
caption: Bounded synthetic passage at 128, 512 and 2,048 leaves. Median canonical receipt and inclusion-proof sizes are accompanied by the executed event, receipt-check and mutation-control totals. Timings are single-host descriptive measurements.

title: Failure modes addressed and not addressed
intended_location: main or supplementary material after manuscript density review
caption: Failure-mode boundary. Executed controls cover schema, minimisation, signature, receipt and retained-checkpoint mutations. Duplicate-leaf occurrence uniqueness and cross-language equivalence remain bounded; split-view coordination, operational key compromise and clinical validity remain outside scope.
